message:
docs(server): clarify blocking sleep design decision in wait_for_drain (bd-2vs0)

Document why blocking sleep is acceptable during graceful shutdown:
- Not a hot path (only called during shutdown)
- Default poll interval is 10ms (minimal CPU impact)
- Async sleep would require threading Time through API
- Added notes about alternatives if needed

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
